description.ko: AQUA-5와 함께 미지의 세계를 탐험하세요. 심해의 거대한 압력을 견디도록 설계된 이 타임피스는 현대적 탐험가를 위한 생체 발광의 선명함과 타의 추종을 불허하는 내구성을 결합했습니다.
description.en: Explore the unexplored with AQUA-5. Designed to withstand the crushing pressure of the deep ocean, this timepiece combines bioluminescent clarity with unparalleled durability for the modern explorer.

prompt: A futuristic high-tech dive watch named AQUA-5, submerged in the dark, mysterious depths of the deep ocean. The watch features glowing cyan bioluminescent markers and a sleek titanium frame. Background includes faint silhouettes of giant squids, glowing jellyfish, and thermal vents. Cinematic lighting with god-rays filtering through deep blue water, ultra-realistic, 8k resolution, macro photography style.
